description: Centralized prompt definitions for all SDD skills. Used by generate-prompt.py.

questions.prompt: Bug severity is unclear. Please classify:

bug-fast-path.description: Fast path choice for Critical/High bug fixes

questions.prompt: Fast path: review requirements and design together?

factual-sync-confirmation.description: Factual-sync triage confirmation (update-mode § 2a). Single yes/no that registers the 'no architectural or design impact' scope classification before applying deltas.

questions.prompt: This is a factual sync ({summary}). No architectural or design impact — proceed?

cosmetic-change-confirmation.description: Cosmetic-change triage confirmation (update-mode § 2a). Single yes/no for whitespace, formatting, or wording-only edits that carry no semantic impact.

questions.prompt: This looks like a cosmetic change ({summary}). No semantic impact — proceed?

steering-scope.description: Which steering docs to update when target is ambiguous

questions.prompt: Which steering document(s) do you want to update?

options.label: structure.md — directory layout, conventions, module boundaries

update-intent.description: Classify a user's update intent so the workflow can route to the right branch. Shared by every update-mode skill (sdd-create-steering, sdd-create-spec, sdd-create-prd) — do NOT hand-roll a variant inline in SKILL.md.

questions.prompt: What kind of change do you want to make to {target_docs}?

options.label: Factual sync — reflect recent code/project changes
Vision / convention change — update strategic direction or coding/architecture rules
Targeted edit — specific section or fact

questions.prompt: Spec already exists.

steering-recreate.description: Previously approved steering doc found in git — restore or create fresh

questions.prompt: A previously approved version of {doc} was found in git history. How would you like to proceed?

steering-collision.description: Steering docs already exist — choose action

questions.prompt: Steering docs already exist.

post-change-review.description: Offer SDD review after document creation or update

questions.prompt: {context}

fix-loop-continue.description: Mandatory prompt after fix-all to confirm re-review loop

questions.prompt: Fixes applied (cycle {fix_cycle}/{max_fix_cycles}). How would you like to proceed?

fix-action.description: Post-code-review decision on how to handle found issues

questions.prompt:
Review found {critical_count} critical, {warning_count} warning, {suggestion_count} suggestion issues.

Top findings:
{top_findings}

What would you like to do?

review-fix-issues.description: Post-review decision on how to handle found issues

options.label: Fix selected issues — I'll specify which

review-action.description: Review changes before approval (with optional SDD review)

questions.prompt: Changes to {doc} ready for review.

approval-inline.description: Pattern A: inline confirm for low-ceremony approvals

questions.prompt: Approve changes to {doc}?

approval-formal.description: Pattern B: formal approval for document creation

approval-formal-required.description: Pattern B: mandatory formal approval (no skip option, e.g. single-document terminal case)

questions.prompt: Status is '{current_status}', not 'pending'. Override?
Archive spec `{spec_name}`?
Spec has incomplete tasks. Archive anyway?
Updated tasks.md ready for review.
Task {task_id} is in_progress. How should it be handled?
Template file not found.
Test failures detected.

coordination-approval.description: Approve coordination spec before sub-spec creation

questions.prompt: Coordination spec for {feature} ready. How would you like to proceed?

options.label: Approve and proceed to sub-spec creation

spec-create-batch-approval.description: Batch approval for all spec documents (R/D/T) as a unit during create-flow Step 10.1

workspace-review-offer.description: Offer quality review before approval in workspace spec creation

questions.prompt:
{scope} spec ({spec_name}) created and validated.
Run a quality review before approval?
Multiple completed specs found.

workspace-batch-review-phase.description: Batch review offer for N repos' docs of one type

questions.prompt:
Phase Review: {scope} ({repo_count} repos)
All {repo_count} repos' {doc}.md ready for review.

workspace-batch-approve-phase.description: Batch approval for N repos' docs of one type. Approve transitions invoke the H1 ceremony — picking 'Approve all' or 'Approve individually' attests human-in-the-loop and the agent runs the emitted retry_shim with SDD_HUMAN_APPROVAL=1 set.

questions.prompt:
Phase Approve: {scope} ({repo_count} repos)
All {repo_count} repos' {doc}.md ready for approval.

Approve transitions invoke the H1 ceremony — set SDD_HUMAN_APPROVAL=1 on the approve subprocess (see human-approval-ceremony.md).
Retry shim: {retry_shim}

options.label: Request revision — I'll specify repos and feedback
Reject — close the gate without approval

questions.prompt: PRD already exists for this feature.

confirm-intent-override.description: Resolve contradictory user feedback (e.g. selected 'Needs revision' then said 'Good')

questions.prompt: You selected **"{selection}"** but your feedback ("{feedback}") seems to {interpretation}. Which would you like to do?

pipeline-instruction-pending.description: Agent-facing instruction shown on a phase envelope when required_tool_calls are attached. Scenario-keyed templates are the single source for instruction copy; phase modules resolve them here instead of carrying per-phase constants.

scenarios.zero_findings: Zero actionable findings. Execute required_tool_calls (TodoWrite), then run next_action_command (--phase ack-calls). After ack-calls returns ok, run phase_commands.{forward_key}. Present artifact_score to user — do NOT use the sub-agent narrative score.
scenarios.findings: Actionable findings detected. Execute required_tool_calls (TodoWrite), then run next_action_command (--phase ack-calls). After ack-calls returns ok, present artifact_score + the review-fix-issues prompt from phase_commands.{forward_key}. Do NOT use the sub-agent narrative score.
scenarios.post_fix: Execute required_tool_calls (TodoWrite), then run next_action_command (--phase ack-calls). After ack-calls returns ok, run phase_commands.{forward_key}.
scenarios.launch: Stale-doc re-entry detected. Execute required_tool_calls (TodoWrite), then run next_action_command (--phase ack-calls). After ack-calls returns ok, run phase_commands.{forward_key} (the Task sub-agent). Authoritative score still comes from phase_commands.post_review — do NOT use the sub-agent narrative score.

pipeline-instruction-clear.description: Agent-facing instruction shown on a phase envelope when no required_tool_calls are pending. Paired with pipeline-instruction-pending.

scenarios.zero_findings: Zero actionable findings. Proceed directly to pre-approval. Present artifact_score to user — do NOT use the sub-agent narrative score.
scenarios.findings: Actionable findings detected. Present artifact_score to user (do NOT use the sub-agent narrative score), then present the review-fix-issues prompt. After user decides, apply fixes and run --phase post-fix.
scenarios.post_fix: No pending tool calls. Proceed to phase_commands.{forward_key}.
scenarios.launch: No pending tool calls. Run next_action_command to dispatch the Task sub-agent, then continue with phase_commands.{forward_key}.

workspace-phase-summary.description: Summary of phase completion across repos

questions.prompt:
Phase {phase} Complete
✓ {approved_count} approved, ⊘ {skipped_count} skipped, ✗ {failed_count} failed
Proceeding to {next_phase}.

approval-confirm-human.description: Confirm human-in-the-loop before approving a review gate. A 'yes' sets SDD_HUMAN_APPROVAL=1 on the subsequent approve subprocess — the sole proof the ActorKindPolicy accepts.

questions.prompt: Approve this review for {target_label}? A 'yes' sets SDD_HUMAN_APPROVAL=1 on the approve subprocess.

options.label: Yes, approve
options.description: I am a human operator and authorise this transition.

spec-batch-approval.description: Batch approval for multiple spec documents (category=spec, scope=final, len(docs)>1). Approve transitions invoke the H1 ceremony — picking 'Approve all' attests human-in-the-loop and the agent runs the emitted retry_shim with SDD_HUMAN_APPROVAL=1 set.

options.label: Request revision — I'll specify documents and feedback
Reject — close the gate without approval

single-doc-approval.description: Single-document approval for category=spec, scope=per-document. The terminal approve action invokes the H1 ceremony — picking 'Approve' attests human-in-the-loop and the agent runs the emitted retry_shim with SDD_HUMAN_APPROVAL=1 set.

options.label: Reject — close the gate without approval
